feed.title: Memedroid
feed.subtitle: Trending memes from memedroid.com (no native feed; scraped from the server-rendered homepage).

entry.title: Once you die, they paint over you signature
Both are annoying because the word “literally” is literally annoying
knowledge and understanding do not eliminate contempt
It’s getting to the center that adds weight
The names are either “FLAMING LIBERTY”, “LIBERAL FART DOOKIE”, or “32 shot red, white, & blue colors”
You want to put what where?
To all you HATERS, people DO have the same name from time to time EAD
Little piggie wee wee wee'd all the way home
I was a cat in a past life
Neoliberalism killed our economy and offshored our jobs
Hi, my name is. (What?) my name is. (who) my name is (chick-a chick-a slim shady)
Sony seriously wants you to believe this is for your benefit
Down vote this if you must. But you cannot be both.

The most American video I've ever seen. Happy Independence Day degenerates! (Meanwhile, I can't even buy or set off fireworks here in Manila without a permit other than just before New Years, which sucks, but my little flag is flying!)
entry.content: The most American video I've ever seen. Happy Independence Day degenerates! (Meanwhile, I can't even buy or set off fireworks here in Manila without a permit other than just before New Years, which sucks, but my little flag is flying!)

entry.title: Happy 4th of July, Memedroids of USA!
entry.content: Happy 4th of July, Memedroids of USA!

entry.title: I'm a delight in real life, just like on here
Is that the check engine light? ?
Gues it's mostly a console issue
Sparkling water is a fucking sin
To be fair, even Cuba isn't stupid enough to let them in unlike our Democrats
“She told me, put the heart, in the bag, and nobody gets hurt”
